hero.name: E.S.Doodles
hero.sub_line: I make things worth looking at — and words worth reading. Stories in ink, pixels, and captions.
hero.hire_mode_sub: Content writer and illustrator driving engagement through visual storytelling. Open to full-time, contract, and freelance roles.

bio: I'm E.S.Doodles — a writer, illustrator, and social media manager drawn to stories about mythology, identity, and the natural world.
My work lives at the crossover between image and text. I've written essays, illustrated comics, managed social media for brands, and built interactive pieces in Rive.
I care about craft — the word that lands right, the line that earns its place, the caption that makes someone pause mid-scroll.
working_style: I work best with clear briefs and room to ask questions early.
I communicate often — no surprises at delivery.
I take revision rounds seriously and document every decision.
I genuinely like collaborative feedback processes.
I'm a strong self-editor and I'll tell you when something isn't working.
services: Social media strategy and content creation

hire.headline: let's make something worth reading.
hire.availability: Currently available for freelance and contract work.
highlights: Grew client Instagram from launch to 2,400 followers in 90 days through original illustrated content and strategic caption writing.
Wrote and illustrated a self-published comic anthology with [X] readers — from concept to print, solo.
Developed brand voice guides for [N] independent brands, all adopted across every client-facing channel.
Delivered illustrated editorial spreads for [N] publication issues, consistently on brief and on deadline.
Managed [N] concurrent client social accounts with engagement rates consistently above platform averages.
Built interactive Rive pieces for brand and personal projects, combining animation and interactive design.

contact.heading: get in touch
contact.sub: commissions, collabs, or just to say hi — I read every message.

brand_voice_samples.caption: Some plants take years to bloom. Turns out that's true for most good things. 🌿 New ceramics in the studio — grown slowly, worth the wait.
The thing about growing things: they don't care about your schedule. This one's been sitting on the windowsill for eight months waiting for exactly the right moment. It knew.
New moon energy: rest, reset, begin quietly. No grand announcements. Just you and your intentions and however much tea you need.
Full moon tonight. If you've been carrying something heavy, you're allowed to put it down now. The light's good enough to see where to set it.
she drew the map from memory. she'd never been there. she'd always been there.
the underworld isn't dark. it's just the light from somewhere else, seen sideways.
